# IRIS GL / OpenGL bridge

## Summary

Public lineage and standards-registry record for OpenGL's transition from SGI IRIS GL into the Khronos-maintained OpenGL specification ecosystem.

## Artifacts

| Artifact | Type | Status | Access |
|---|---|---|---|
| IRIS GL to OpenGL public history record | api-lineage-record | public-reference-only | public |
| Khronos OpenGL registry specification anchor | standards-registry-anchor | public-reference-only | public |
